titlestmt.titleproper: Edward Needles and Charles Croasdale Trump papers2869
titlestmt.author: Compiled by S. Lee

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-04-07 23:54:28 -0400.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Edward Needles and Charles Croasdale Trump papers
did.physdesc: Correspondence, Financial Records, Legal Documents, Newspapers, Photographs
did.abstract: Family papers regarding the Trump family.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Family papers include letters from Edward N. Trump to his father, Charles Newbold Trump (1881-1898); correspondence between Edward N. Trump and his son, Charles C. Trump (1898-1945); correspondence between Charles C. Trump and his sons Peter Bulley Trump and Charles Edward Trump (1942-1956), his wife Rachel Bulley Trump, and his sister Marjorie Trump; correspondence and legal documents related to the estate of Edward N. Trump (1944-1946); and correspondence and financial documents related to Edward N. Trump's management of the financial affairs of his aunt and uncle, Marie Louise and Charles A. Lasar while they were in Europe (1902-1930).

Also included are genealogical records, photographs, clippings, legal and financial documents including income tax and banking records, and student papers. Business papers concern Edward and Charles Trump's investments, developments of patents, employment by various companies including the Solvay Process Company (1885-1936), the Dolomite Marine Corporation (1934-1941), the Sanitary Metal Cap Corporation (1935-1938), Marco Company, Inc. (1940-1943), and the F.C. Haub Company (1951-1954) and includes correspondence, photographs, drawings, speeches, patents, notebooks, blueprints, and articles.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Edward Needles and Charles Croasdale Trump papers, #2869. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Edward N. Trump, Cornell University Class of 1978, was an engineer with the Semet-Solvay Company, Syracuse, New York. His son, Charles C. Trump, graduated from Cornell in 1911.

unittitle.extref: Link to the paper finding aid. PDF file.
